behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: The real failure boundary is in local wiring: summary-write path must read persisted per-dimension findings for the same round and enforce a cross-record invariant. A single-function unit test could miss query/filter/transaction mistakes.
behaviors.test_description: Create a round with persisted findings containing at least one FAIL verdict. Call the real summary-persistence entrypoint (handler/service/repo stack) with a PASS summary payload. Assert the write is rejected (or stored as non-PASS), and verify no PASS-finalized state is committed for that round.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: This is a module-handoff/data-source correctness issue: gate logic must read the findings store rather than trust summary text. Mocking storage or bypassing wiring can hide the exact regression.
behaviors.test_description: Persist findings for a round with one FAIL, and persist a conflicting manual summary text claiming all PASS. Run the real stop-gate computation path. Assert verdict is not PASS and is derived from stored findings. Also verify changing summary text alone does not flip the gate result when findings are unchanged.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: The behavior spans validation plus durable audit side effects. A unit test of just the validator would miss missing/incorrect warning-record persistence and policy enforcement at the write boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Attempt to submit manual override text without override flag through the real summary update flow; assert rejection. Repeat with override flag enabled; assert acceptance plus creation of an audit warning record containing round id, actor, timestamp, and override reason/type.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the review loop cannot finalize PASS unless a fresh review-agent round is executed on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: The defect is stale-state orchestration: finalization must verify review-round freshness against current diff/version metadata. This is local coordination logic, not model-quality validation.
behaviors.test_description: Record a completed review round tied to diff/version A. Update code to diff/version B (simulated via changed diff hash/version marker) without creating a new review round. Invoke finalization; assert PASS is blocked with a stale-review reason. Then create a new round tied to B and assert finalization can proceed only if findings permit.

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings, the flow emits an escalation outcome instead of PASS.
behaviors.justification: This requires loop controller + findings store + policy thresholds working together. Unit tests may miss off-by-one/termination and state propagation bugs across components.
behaviors.test_description: Configure max review rounds (e.g., 2). Seed unresolved MUST-FIX findings that persist across rounds. Execute the real round-advancement/finalization flow until limit is reached. Assert terminal outcome is ESCALATION (or equivalent) and explicitly not PASS, with unresolved MUST-FIX context attached.
